chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Is Active
entities_post_resolution.definition: A boolean attribute indicating whether the subject is active (true) or inactive (false), governing whether related business actions are permitted.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: Represents a single product line within a sales order (an order line item), identified by LINE_ID, with foreign keys ORDER_ID linking to the order header and PRODUCT_ID linking to the product catalog.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Parent order | NO | | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Product ordered | NO | | | QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO | | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price at time of order | NO | | | LINE_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Extended amount (qty × price) | NO | | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line item on a Sales Order that specifies a product, quantity, and unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | "Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | "Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | "Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: An integer column that serves as a self-referential foreign key to the parent category in the TB_CATEGORY hierarchy.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a monetary transaction that settles a Sales Order, linked to exactly one Sales Order and recording the payment method, amount, confirmation timestamp, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts. | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | PAYMENT_METHOD | VARCHAR(50) | Credit card, PayPal, etc. | NO | | | AMOUNT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Payment amount | NO | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/FAILED/REFUNDED | NO | | | CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Payment creation timestamp | NO | | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: The Sales Order Header is the table/entity that records header-level information for each customer order, identified by ORDER_ID and linked to the customer via CUST_ID, and acts as the parent for order line items and payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual shipment record representing the physical delivery of products to a customer, identified by a unique shipment ID and associated with a Sales Order, with details such as source warehouse, destination address, shipped timestamp, tracking number, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers. | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | | SHIPPED_AT | DATETIME | Ship timestamp | YES | | | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: Primary key column representing the unique identifier for a product in the TB_PRODUCT table.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | TB_PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | - PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: Master record for all registered platform customers, identified by the CUST_ID primary key.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | FOREIGN Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)
 | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | | CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | | CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Whether Customer Can
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing the delivery address for a customer's shipment, linked to a specific shipment and sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | "Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments." | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────

entities_post_resolution.name: User Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A user’s email address that is unique and used as the login credential for authentication in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login)

entities_post_resolution.name: Geographic Region For Tax
entities_post_resolution.definition: A geographic region code used to determine tax applicability and rates for transactions, typically stored as a concise region identifier (e.g., REGION_CODE) for tax calculation purposes.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Status Codes
entities_post_resolution.definition: The set of permissible status codes that describe the lifecycle state of an order or shipment, e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered, and Cancelled.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price At
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unit price per unit for a product as recorded on a sales order line at the time the order was placed (historical price).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | "Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price at time of order | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | "Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Business Rules**:
- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates

entities_post_resolution.name: Quantity
entities_post_resolution.definition: A numeric field representing the number of units in a transaction or order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO | | "Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: STATUS_CODE is a code field representing the current status of an item or process (e.g., PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED, FAILED, REFUNDED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/FAILED/REFUNDED | NO | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Refund
entities_post_resolution.definition: Refund is the monetary reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is canceled or a product is returned under the seller's returns policy.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: 30 Days Of Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identity, contact information, regional segmentation, account status, and the date the customer was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores product catalog information, including identifiers, naming, category association, pricing, and active status for products.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical category data for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header-level information for sales orders, including customer reference, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items for orders, including which product was ordered, the quantity, unit price, and the total line amount for each item.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including the payment method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments associated with customer orders, including when items were shipped, the warehouse fulfillment location, tracking information, and current shipment status.
